body:
gurobleedingblossom:

My blog is for the sapphics who are royalty, weird, loser, animalistic, trans, cis, “ugly”, “pretty”, butch, femme, futch, himejoshi, himedanshi, hopeless romantic, aromantic, aroace, asexual, disabled, black, white, brown, or whatever.

My blog is for the sapphics!
